changelog:
This is an early test release of InputBlocker v0.1.0. I am unable to test this build myself, so please report any issues you encounter.

📌 What's new:
- Overlay service no longer blocks all touches when no blocking zones are configured (fixes boot lockout issue)
- Module APK is now placed at correct paths inside the ZIP for proper installation
- Module ZIP renamed to InputBlockerModule.zip for clarity
- PC Tool: All buttons now have uniform width and height
- PC Tool: Console window disabled for production builds
- PC Tool: Skiko restricted-method warning suppressed

📱 Module testing:
Flash the InputBlockerModule.zip in your root manager and verify the companion app installs and the overlay starts. Configure some zones via the PC tool and push them to the device.

💻 PC Tool testing:
Download the Windows/Linux/macOS build and verify the UI renders correctly. Try drawing zones, pushing configs via ADB, and analyzing logs.

🐛 Please report:
- Installation failures (module not flashing, app not installing)
- Overlay not starting or behaving incorrectly
- PC Tool crashes or UI glitches
- Any boot loops or instability

All feedback is appreciated as I cannot test these builds myself. Thank you!

---
### Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 100 |
